exercises.title: MEAN TEMPO
exercises.brief: Average tempo across the whole crate.
exercises.prompt: From **tracks(title, artist, bpm, genre)**, return a **single value**: the **average bpm** across **all** tracks. No specific order is required.
exercises.setup: CREATE TABLE tracks (title TEXT, artist TEXT, bpm INTEGER, genre TEXT);INSERT INTO tracks VALUES ('Da Funk','Daft Punk',112,'house'),('Aerodynamic','Daft Punk',123,'house'),('Windowlicker','Aphex Twin',100,'idm'),('Avril 14th','Aphex Twin',60,'ambient'),('Awake','Tycho',120,'synthwave');
exercises.hint: AVG(bpm) collapses every row into one mean value.
exercises.lore: The deck finds the heartbeat of the whole set in one pulse.

exercises.title: SLOWEST AND FASTEST
exercises.brief: The tempo floor and ceiling in one row.
exercises.prompt: From **tracks(title, artist, bpm, genre)**, return **two values in one row**: the **minimum bpm** and the **maximum bpm** across all tracks (min first, then max). No specific order is required.
exercises.setup: CREATE TABLE tracks (title TEXT, artist TEXT, bpm INTEGER, genre TEXT);INSERT INTO tracks VALUES ('Da Funk','Daft Punk',112,'house'),('Aerodynamic','Daft Punk',123,'house'),('Windowlicker','Aphex Twin',100,'idm'),('Avril 14th','Aphex Twin',60,'ambient'),('Awake','Tycho',120,'synthwave');
exercises.hint: Put both MIN(bpm) and MAX(bpm) in the same SELECT list.
exercises.lore: Drag the slowest crawl and the hardest sprint into the same readout.

exercises.title: TEMPO BY GENRE
exercises.prompt: From **tracks(title, artist, bpm, genre)**, return **genre** and the **average bpm** for that genre, one row **per genre**. Sort by **genre** alphabetically (A->Z).
exercises.setup: CREATE TABLE tracks (title TEXT, artist TEXT, bpm INTEGER, genre TEXT);INSERT INTO tracks VALUES ('Da Funk','Daft Punk',112,'house'),('Aerodynamic','Daft Punk',123,'house'),('Windowlicker','Aphex Twin',100,'idm'),('Avril 14th','Aphex Twin',60,'ambient'),('Awake','Tycho',120,'synthwave');
exercises.solution: SELECT genre, AVG(bpm) FROM tracks GROUP BY genre ORDER BY genre;
exercises.hint: GROUP BY genre makes one row per genre, then ORDER BY genre.
exercises.lore: Each sound-clan reports its own collective pulse to the grid.

exercises.title: GENRE TOTALS
exercises.brief: Count and summed tempo per genre, only multi-track genres.
exercises.prompt: From **tracks(title, artist, bpm, genre)**, return **genre**, the **number of tracks** in that genre, and the **total (summed) bpm** of that genre — but only for genres holding **more than one track**. Sort by **genre** alphabetically (A->Z).
exercises.setup: CREATE TABLE tracks (title TEXT, artist TEXT, bpm INTEGER, genre TEXT);INSERT INTO tracks VALUES ('Da Funk','Daft Punk',112,'house'),('Aerodynamic','Daft Punk',123,'house'),('Windowlicker','Aphex Twin',100,'idm'),('Avril 14th','Aphex Twin',60,'ambient'),('Awake','Tycho',120,'synthwave');
exercises.starter: SELECT genre, COUNT(*), SUM(bpm) FROM tracks GROUP BY genre ORDER BY genre;
exercises.solution: SELECT genre, COUNT(*), SUM(bpm) FROM tracks GROUP BY genre HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY genre;
exercises.hint: Group by genre, then filter the groups with HAVING COUNT(*) > 1.
exercises.lore: Only the crews deep enough to field a pair make the totals board.

exercises.title: FAST FLOORS ONLY
exercises.brief: Artists whose slowest track still hits hard.
exercises.prompt: From **tracks(title, artist, bpm, genre)**, return **artist** and that artist's **minimum bpm**, keeping only artists whose **minimum bpm is at least 100**. Sort by **artist** alphabetically (A->Z).
exercises.setup: CREATE TABLE tracks (title TEXT, artist TEXT, bpm INTEGER, genre TEXT);INSERT INTO tracks VALUES ('Da Funk','Daft Punk',112,'house'),('Aerodynamic','Daft Punk',123,'house'),('Windowlicker','Aphex Twin',100,'idm'),('Avril 14th','Aphex Twin',60,'ambient'),('Awake','Tycho',120,'synthwave');
exercises.starter: SELECT artist, MIN(bpm) FROM tracks GROUP BY artist ORDER BY artist;
exercises.solution: SELECT artist, MIN(bpm) FROM tracks GROUP BY artist HAVING MIN(bpm) >= 100 ORDER BY artist;
exercises.hint: Group by artist, then use HAVING MIN(bpm) >= 100 to drop the slow crews.
exercises.lore: If even your sleepiest track keeps the floor moving, you're on the list.
